faqs.question: What types of termites are common in Valley Stream, Long Island?
faqs.answer: Valley Stream properties are primarily threatened by subterranean termites, which thrive in Long Island's moist soil conditions. Occasionally, drywood termites are also found in older wooden structures. Our inspections identify the specific termite species affecting your home to determine the most effective treatment approach.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in Valley Stream homes?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Valley Stream are completed within 4-8 hours for an average-sized home, though larger properties or severe infestations may require additional time. Liquid barrier treatments and bait station installations can typically be done in one day, with follow-up monitoring scheduled at regular intervals.
